calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Verified Petition For Releasen Of Property From Mechanics' Lien
Off Calendar May-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF LONG PROSPERITY, LLC'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS' LIEN.
Appearances: Michael E. Hanna of Morris Polich & Purdy (984.8521) for petitioner and moving party; Scarlett Ku (626.821.0526) representing respondent and opposing party MHG Construction, Inc. in propria persona.

Ms. Ku did not give notice of her intent to argue. Discussed and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
